creator: freebsd@winterfell.nl
text:
df is presenting me with some strange reading. It says I have -14GB free space and I'm using 101% if the HDD's capacity

How-To-Repeat:         Not sure. I simply filled my disk to the limit of it's capacity. The disk is a 1,5TB USB disk. It has one slice and one partition that use the enire disk. The partition is formatted with a standard FreeBSD UFS filesystem with soft-journaling enabled.
